## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] Formatting, lint, typecheck, tests, and production build pass
- [ ] Relevant Chromium flow passes
- [ ] No secrets, private backup paths, or real user data were added
- [ ] AI/model output does not decide recoverability or restore safety
- [ ] Imported or user-selected content remains bounded and non-executable
- [ ] Documentation and screenshots are updated where behavior changed
